author: jasonsting622-netizen
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Lock folders and optionally encrypt Markdown files inside selected folders.

manifest.author: JasonSting
manifest.description: Lock vault folders with a password and optionally encrypt Markdown files inside selected folders.
manifest.name: Folder Crypto

name: Folder Crypto

releases.author: jasonsting622-netizen
releases.description: Multi-folder support in settings, UI improvements.
releases.name: 0.1.7 - Multi-folder lock UI

releases.author: jasonsting622-netizen
releases.description:
Community release with publish-ready manifest metadata.

Includes folder lock controls, optional Finder hide sync, content encryption/decryption, and a recovery decrypt command.
releases.name: Folder Crypto 0.1.5

releases.author: jasonsting622-netizen
releases.description:
Initial public release for Obsidian community review.

Includes folder lock controls, optional Finder hide sync, content encryption/decryption, and a recovery decrypt command.
releases.name: Folder Crypto 0.1.4
